title: FreeFile Function
description:
FreeFile Function

FreeFile Function

Returns / reserves a file number that is currently not being used.
see_also:
AOpen

BOpen

Close

ROpen

UOpen

WOpen

FreeFile Function Example

Integer fileNum, i, j

		fileNum = FreeFile

WOpen "TEST.DAT" As #fileNum

		For i = 0 To 100

		  Print #fileNum, i

		Next i

		Close #fileNum

fileNum = FreeFile

ROpen "TEST.DAT" As #fileNum

		For i = 0 to 100

		  Input #fileNum, j

		  Print "data = ", j

		Next i

		Close #fileNum
examples:
Integer fileNum, i, j
		fileNum = FreeFile

WOpen "TEST.DAT" As #fileNum
		For i = 0 To 100
		  Print #fileNum, i
		Next i
		Close #fileNum

fileNum = FreeFile

		ROpen "TEST.DAT" As #fileNum
		For i = 0 to 100
		  Input #fileNum, j
		  Print "data = ", j
		Next i
		Close #fileNum
